name: Ace Pickleball Club - Peachtree City
description: Ace Pickleball Club - Peachtree City is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Peachtree City, GA. There are 14 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and food.

name: Braelinn Log House
description: Braelinn Log House is a place to play pickleball in Peachtree City, GA. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Covenant Presbyterian Church
description: Come play pickleball at Covenant Presbyterian Church in Fayetteville, GA! You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Dorothea Redwine Park
description: Park near playground and walk up path towards ball field.

name: East Fayette Gym
description: East Fayette Gym is a place to play pickleball in Fayetteville, GA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — $2 per session for in county residents and $3 for out of county residents.  Starting in 2026 $5 per month in county and $7.50 for out of county residents.

name: Flat Creek Country Club
description: Flat Creek Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Peachtree City, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Kedron Field House
description: Kedron Field House is a place to play pickleball in Peachtree City, GA. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: Hours vary - gym schedule available online at www.peachtree-city.org/opengym

name: Kiwanis Park
description: Four tennis courts are pictured. August 2024 three permanent PB courts opened in the area just below the tennis courts that are pictured.

name: Lake Windsong
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Windsong in Tyrone, GA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights.

name: Let’s Go Pickleball & Padel
description: Let’s Go Pickleball & Padel is a place to play pickleball in Peachtree City, GA. There are 21 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, lights, locker rooms, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, trainers or lessons, water, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming.

name: Trilith
description: Come play pickleball at Trilith in Fayetteville, GA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.
